title: DSRM Admin Logon Behavior Enabled for Persistence
description: Detects enabling of DsrmAdminLogonBehavior (registry value 2) on a Domain Controller, which lets the Directory Services Restore Mode local admin authenticate over the network — a stealthy DC backdoor once the DSRM hash is synced (e.g. via mimikatz lsadump::dcsync or set-ntlm).
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*DsrmAdminLogonBehavior*' and 'Command Line' like '*add*')) and (('Command Line' like '*Lsa*' or 'Command Line' like '*reg add*')))
